caption:
✨ The lecture ended early, but my day was just beginning... 💅

Walking through the empty halls of the university library, the air smelled of old paper and my own perfume. I adjusted my tight black blazer, feeling the fabric hug my curves perfectly. Tonight, I decided to wear that silk blouse beneath it that barely hid the depth of my cleavage, just enough to tease. 🍓 I know the starry-eyed students waiting outside the door. They always look up to me in my power suit, but I know what lies beneath the academic professionalism. Tonight isn't about teaching calculus, it's about teaching them a lesson in confidence. 💃 My pencil skirt rode up just slightly as I sat in my favorite leather armchair, the heels clicking softly on the hardwood floor. I could almost hear the whispers in my head, wondering if I was the professor or the student today. 😉 The shadows played with the gold buttons of my blazer, and I loved the way they accentuated every inch of my hourglass frame. This is my secret garden, my playground of knowledge and desire. I smiled at the reflection in the glass door, knowing exactly what I did to them. 🌹

#UniversityLife #TeacherVibes #Curves #SexyOffice #AcademicAllure #FrenchTeacher #SecretDesire #OOTD #InstaGlam
